speaker: speaker1
text: Oh dear , my weight has gone up again .

speaker: speaker2
text: I am not surprised , you eat too much .

speaker: speaker1
text: And I suppose sitting at the desk all day in the office doesn't help .

speaker: speaker1
text: I do wish I could lose weight .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , why don't you go on the diet ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I've tried diets before but they've never worked .

speaker: speaker2
text: Perhaps you should excercise more . Why don't you go to an exercise class .
